# Archi Construction & Veranda - robots.txt
# https://archi.constructionveranda.com

# Allow all crawlers
User-agent: *
Allow: /

# Disallow admin and private paths
Disallow: /api/
Disallow: /node_modules/

# Allow important resources
Allow: /images/
Allow: /videos/
Allow: /*.css
Allow: /*.js

# Sitemaps
Sitemap: https://archi.constructionveranda.com/sitemap.xml

# Google specific
User-agent: Googlebot
Allow: /

User-agent: Googlebot-Image
Allow: /images/

User-agent: Googlebot-Video
Allow: /videos/

# Bing specific
User-agent: Bingbot
Allow: /

# Social Media Crawlers
User-agent: facebookexternalhit
Allow: /

User-agent: Twitterbot
Allow: /

User-agent: LinkedInBot
Allow: /

# AI Search Crawlers - Allow for AI visibility
User-agent: GPTBot
Allow: /

User-agent: OAI-SearchBot
Allow: /

User-agent: ChatGPT-User
Allow: /

User-agent: ClaudeBot
Allow: /

User-agent: PerplexityBot
Allow: /

User-agent: anthropic-ai
Allow: /

# Block training crawlers (content protection)
User-agent: CCBot
Disallow: /
